scripts.version:patch: jq --arg new_version $(jq -r .version package.json | awk -F. '{print $1"."$2"."$3+1}') '.version=$new_version' package.json > tmp.json && mv tmp.json package.json
scripts.version:minor: jq --arg new_version $(jq -r .version package.json | awk -F. '{print $1"."$2+1".0"}') '.version=$new_version' package.json > tmp.json && mv tmp.json package.json
scripts.version:major: jq --arg new_version $(jq -r .version package.json | awk -F. '{print $1+1".0.0"}') '.version=$new_version' package.json > tmp.json && mv tmp.json package.json
scripts.docker:build: docker buildx build -f Dockerfile --platform=linux/amd64 -t ghcr.io/jwilson45/obx-conditions:$(jq -r .version package.json) -t ghcr.io/jwilson45/obx-conditions:latest --load .
scripts.docker:push: docker buildx build -f Dockerfile --platform=linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t ghcr.io/jwilson45/obx-conditions:$(jq -r .version package.json) -t ghcr.io/jwilson45/obx-conditions:latest --push .
scripts.deploy: helm upgrade --install obx-prod helm/obx --namespace obx --create-namespace -f helm/values/obx/values-prod.yaml --set-string image.tag=$(jq -r .version package.json) --wait
scripts.release: bun run docker:push && bun run deploy
